problem id: 02324ba1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHR(4)

examples:
  10000010 -> 11110111
  10011111 -> 11100111
  00010101 -> 11111110
  00000101 -> 11111111
  11111110 -> 11111111
  01010111 -> 11111010
  01100101 -> 11111101
  10111100 -> 11110111
  11000100 -> 11111011

query: 11011001
predicted answer: 11101011
